# DJW Pickleball Factory

> AI-readable site guide for https://pickleoem.com

DJW Pickleball Factory is a China-based B2B pickleball manufacturer and wholesale supplier. The site focuses on OEM/ODM pickleball paddles, pickleball balls, factory-direct wholesale supply, custom branding, quality control, and international DDP shipping.

## Primary Pages

- Homepage: https://pickleoem.com/
- Products: https://pickleoem.com/products
- OEM and custom manufacturing: https://pickleoem.com/oem
- Factory tour: https://pickleoem.com/factory-tour
- VR factory tour: https://pickleoem.com/vr-tour
- About: https://pickleoem.com/about
- Market insights: https://pickleoem.com/market
- Blog: https://pickleoem.com/blog
- Sitemap: https://pickleoem.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://pickleoem.com/robots.txt

## Product And Content Sources

- Product detail pages live under: https://pickleoem.com/products/
- Blog articles live under: https://pickleoem.com/blog/
- WordPress-compatible content index: https://pickleoem.com/api/wp-json/wp/v2/posts
- WordPress API discovery: https://pickleoem.com/api/wp-json/

## Structured Data

The site provides Schema.org JSON-LD (canonical entity name: "DJW Pickleball Factory"):

- Organization schema on all pages
- WebSite schema on all pages
- Product + BreadcrumbList schema on product detail pages
- Article + BreadcrumbList schema on blog post pages
- FAQPage schema inside blog articles

## Commercial Focus

The site is intended for importers, distributors, retailers, clubs, and brands sourcing pickleball equipment in bulk. Core topics include:

- Custom pickleball paddles
- Carbon fiber pickleball paddles
- USAPA-approved pickleball equipment
- Wholesale pickleball balls
- OEM/ODM manufacturing
- Factory pricing
- Bulk orders and low MOQ
- Custom logos and private label packaging
- International DDP shipping

## Contact

- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/8618666680913
- Phone: +86-18666680913
- Company location: Yiwu, Zhejiang, China

## Crawl Guidance

AI assistants and search crawlers may use the sitemap, structured data, product pages, blog pages, and WordPress-compatible post index to understand the public site. Do not use checkout, account, admin, studio, or private API endpoints as source material.
